title: Sterling TML130N 75 mm Tubular Mortice Latch - Chrome Nickel
features: Sprung high quality latch for effortless operation
Suitable for commercial and domestic use
Nickle finish including striker plate & screws
Also available in 63MM & in brass finish
description: From the manufacturer Who We Are Sterling offers a range of physical security hardware with an emphasis on quality and great value. Sterling is a brand of Burg-Wächter, Europe’s largest safe and post box manufacturer and a trusted brand throughout the world. Burg-Wächter has a proud heritage of over 120 years and are recognised for quality standards across our extensive range of locks, padlocks, safes, post boxes and access control solutions. Over 120 years security experience 10,000 individual product lines Europe’s one of the largest safe and post box manufacturer Sterling TML130N Indoor Tubular Mortise Latch Nickel - 75mm - 3.0" The Sterling 75mm 3.0" nickel tubular mortice latch is designed to fit the majority of handles or door knobs, either as replacement or new fit. It is supplied with the striker plate and fixing screws. It uses a sprung high quality latch for effortless operation and can be used in domestic or commercial doors. Also avaliable in 63MM 2.5" option with chrome nickel and brass finish in both.
